sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: SCHF Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:SCHF
feed.summary: This page provides a detailed overview of the Schwab International Equity ETF (SCHF), including its current price, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and performance over various timeframes. It also covers the fund's structure, investment strategy, holdings breakdown, and technical analysis indicators. Additionally, the page answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and SCHF specifically.

feed.title: Schwab 5-10 year corporate bond ETF declares monthly distribution of $0.0912
feed.summary: The Schwab 5-10 Year Corporate Bond ETF (NYSEARCA:SCHI) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.0912 per share, payable on March 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 15, 2026. This distribution represents an annualized forward yield of 4.14%.
